title: Commercial Pilot
description: Commercial pilots are responsible for safely transporting passengers or cargo by air. They operate aircraft ranging from small planes to large commercial airliners, adhering to strict safety regulations and navigation protocols.
content: Commercial pilots undergo extensive training, including flight school and simulator training, to obtain the necessary licenses and certifications. They must possess excellent flying skills, strong decision-making abilities, and the ability to remain calm under pressure. In India, opportunities exist with domestic and international airlines, cargo carriers, and private aviation companies.

financialFeasibility.note: Flight training is expensive in India. While loans and scholarships are available, access is easier for students from financially stable backgrounds.

sectorScore.remarks: The private sector (airlines like IndiGo, SpiceJet, Air India) offers more opportunities than government-run aviation services. Government jobs are available in Air Force and Coast Guard.

relatedCareers.reason: Ensures the safe and efficient flow of air traffic.
relatedCareers.title: Air Traffic Controller

genderDistribution.note: While still male-dominated, the number of female pilots is steadily increasing in India due to initiatives promoting gender equality in aviation.
